puja.lp.faq.heading: Frequently Asked
puja.lp.faq.1.a: Savidhi is a devotional platform where devotees can participate in Online Pujas, Temple Rituals, Offerings, Astrology Services and other spiritual activities from the comfort of their home.
puja.lp.faq.2.q: How can I participate in an Online Puja or Chadhava?
puja.lp.faq.2.a: Simply select your desired Puja or Chadhava on Savidhi, enter the required details and complete the booking process. The Puja will be performed on your behalf by experienced Vedic priests.
puja.lp.faq.3.q: Will I receive proof or updates of the Rituals?
puja.lp.faq.3.a: Yes. Depending on the ritual, devotees may receive updates, Sankalp details, photos, videos or confirmation after completion of the ritual.
puja.lp.faq.4.q: Are the Rituals performed by verified priests?
puja.lp.faq.4.a: Yes. All Rituals are performed by experienced and knowledgeable Vedic priests associated with temples and spiritual traditions.
puja.lp.faq.5.q: Can I offer Chadhava or Prasad Online Separately?
puja.lp.faq.5.a: Yes. Devotees can offer temple offerings, puja samagri and devotional contributions online through the platform.
puja.lp.faq.6.q: Are astrology and spiritual guidance services available?
puja.lp.faq.6.a: Yes. Savidhi may offer astrology consultations, Panchang guidance and spiritual services through experienced experts.
puja.lp.faq.7.q: Is my payment secure on Savidhi?
puja.lp.faq.7.a: Yes. We aim to provide safe and secure payment options while maintaining privacy and transaction security for devotees.
puja.lp.faq.8.q: Can I book Pujas for my family members?
puja.lp.faq.8.a: Yes. You can book Pujas and rituals for yourself, your family members or loved ones by providing their details during booking.
puja.lp.faq.9.q: What if I need support or assistance?
puja.lp.faq.9.a: You can contact the Savidhi support team for booking assistance, ritual guidance or any devotional-related queries.
puja.lp.faq.10.a: Savidhi aims to make spiritual and devotional experiences authentic, accessible and convenient through trusted rituals and temple services.
